_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The competent authorities and manufacturers shall be responsible for the correctness and quality of the data they report. They shall inform the Commission without delay of any errors detected. Type-approval authorities and manufacturers shall, without delay, report to the Commission any deviations from the data reported.
prior.source_span: 1. The competent authorities and manufacturers shall be responsible for the correctness and quality of the data they report pursuant to Articles 13a and 13b. They shall inform the Commission without delay of any errors detected in the data reported.
